name: product-carousel-builder
description: Use when the user asks to find, compare, recommend, or display real purchasable products as product cards or a carousel. Do not use for non-shopping research or generic visual cards.

resources.description: Worked example based on an Amazon men’s shampoo search, including extraction fields and carousel curation logic.
Guardrail from the user's 2026-06-05 correction: research current best models first, then product-search exact candidates for broad/high-consideration shopping requests.
